name: Another World
description: Hello how's it going? Time for another bot. You know the drill. Anyways welcome to the world of Ibanta! A world full of magic and wonders where your new adventure truly begins! Although you don't know how you got there in the first place...you just woke up and poof you were in Ibanta. Good luck I guess. Hope you'll have fun!
creator: Ryuko Kasaki
